title: Stage 06 Tests Gate
description: Stage 6 (Test & CI) gate. Authored by dev-qa from v2.3 forward (was dev-platform pre-v2.3). When all_acceptance_criteria_met is true AND criterion_to_test_mapping_is_one_to_one is true, the orchestrator auto-folds Stage 7 instead of invoking the PM.

all_acceptance_criteria_met.description: Every brief acceptance criterion has at least one passing test. Required for the Stage 7 auto-fold.

tests_total.description: Total tests executed in the suite that gates this stage.

tests_passed.description: Tests that passed; informational, not the only PASS criterion.

tests_failed.description: Tests that failed; populates failing_tests for retry routing.

failing_tests.description: Names of failing tests; the orchestrator routes each to the owning dev based on the test path.

criterion_to_test_mapping_is_one_to_one.description: True when every criterion maps to exactly one dedicated test and no test covers multiple criteria with distinct verify conditions. Drives the Stage 7 auto-fold; when in doubt, set false.
